intentSynonyms: add a to queue in spotify
add a track or episode to the playback queue in spotify
description: Add a track or episode to the end of the playback queue. Requires the Spotify URI of the item (e.g., "spotify:track:4iV5W9uYEdYUVa79Axb7Rh").

uri.description: Spotify URI of the track or episode to add (e.g., "spotify:track:4iV5W9uYEdYUVa79Axb7Rh")

device_id.description: Device ID to target. If omitted, targets the active device.
